name: QA 1166
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1166

Check that promoted symbols are still visible in libpcp.



Copyright (c) 2017 Ken McDonell.  All Rights Reserved.



**To reproduce this test in a container, please run:**

    ./build/ci/run.py --runner container --platform centos7 reproduce
descriptionHtml:
PCP QA Test No. 1166

Check that promoted symbols are still visible in libpcp.

Copyright (c) 2017 Ken McDonell. All Rights Reserved.

To reproduce this test in a container, please run:

./build/ci/run.py --runner container --platform centos7 reproduce
statusMessage:
output mismatch (see 1166.out.bad)
3,32c3
< __pmGetAPIConfig test: OK
< __pmOpenLog test: expect to see standard log format
< Log for 1166 on HOST started DATE
< 
< G'day cobber
< __pmNoMem test: expect to see a message
< [DATE] qa_libpcp_compat(PID) Warning: 1166: malloc(123456) failed: Cannot allocate memory
< __pmNotifyErr test: expect to see standard message format
< [DATE] qa_libpcp_compat(PID) Notice: Hullo world! The answer is 42
< __pmPrintDesc test:
<     Data Type: 64-bit unsigned int  InDom: PM_INDOM_NULL 0xffffffff
<     Semantics: counter  Units: Mbyte / sec
< __pmtimeval* tests:
< Add (expect 1234.567000): 1234.567000
< Inc (expect 1234.567000): 1234.567000
< Sub (expect 1234.567000): 1234.567000
< Dec (expect 1234.567000): 1234.567000
< Now: OK
< Stamp: (expect 01:02:03.456) 01:02:03.456
< HighResStamp: (expect 02:01:00.123456789) 02:01:00.123456789
< __pmPathSeparator test: OK
< __pmGetUsername test: OK
< pmFreeHighResResult test:
< __pmFreeHighResResult(ADDR)
< pmSpecLocalPMDA test:
< Expected error: pmSpecLocal(foo): bad op in spec
< pmSpecLocal(clear): OK
< pmSpecLocal(add,...): OK
< __pmSetProcessIdentity test: (expect failure)
< [DATE] qa_libpcp_compat(PID) Critical: cannot find the no-such-user user to switch to
